NOTICE OF APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABS SEAFOOD, INC., A CORPORATION HEARING SET FOR JUN-21-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF ABS SEAFOOD, INC.'S HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT AS TO ZHI CHAO WU INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA TAO RESTAURANT IS GRANTED, FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. A RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER SHALL ISSUE IN THE AMOUNT FOR $ 7,847.91 THAT INCLUDES THE OUTSTANDING AMOUNT OWED OF $ 5,847.89, ESTIMATED COSTS OF $ 1,000.00, AND ATTORNEY FEES OF $ 1,000.00 PER CIV. CODE 1717.5(A). AN UNDERTAKING OF $ 10,000.00 IS REQUIRED. NO OPPOSITION WSA FILED. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jun-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF ABS SEAFOOD, INC.'s Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment as to ZHI CHAO WU INDIVIDUALLY AND dba TAO RESTAURANT is Granted, for good cause shown. A right to attach order shall issue in the amount for $ 7,847.91 that includes the outstanding amount owed of $ 5,847.89, estimated costs of $ 1,000.00, and attorney fees of $ 1,000.00 per Civ. Code 1717.5(a). An undertaking of $ 10,000.00 is required. No opposition wsa filed. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/mjm
